description_long: This is a weathered glass bottle with a pink label and blue accents, featuring a prominent circular logo on the front and back. The bottle has a long neck and a blue cap, with visible signs of wear, including scratches, scuffs, and faded areas on the label and glass. The label displays a stylized emblem with a red element in the center, surrounded by blue and white text and graphics. The bottle's surface appears rough and matte, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements or handled frequently. The cap is metallic and crimped, typical of a pry-off bottle cap. The overall appearance suggests it is a beverage bottle, possibly for soda or beer, and it is empty or nearly empty based on the lack of visible liquid inside.
description: A worn glass bottle with a pink and blue label, blue cap, and visible scuffs and faded graphics. The bottle has a rough, matte surface and a prominent circular logo.
description_view_0: The bottle is shown with the side label visible, displaying part of the blue and pink design and significant wear on the surface.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main circular logo and text on the pink label, with the blue cap clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the bottle is shown, mirroring the wear and label design seen in view 0, with less of the main logo visible.
description_view_3: The back view again centers the circular logo, similar to the front, with heavy wear and faded areas on the label.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a circular blue and white logo with a red element in the center, surrounded by blue text on a pink background. The label is faded and scratched, with the logo and text appearing on both the front and back.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Significant wear, scratches, scuffs, and faded areas on the label and glass surface.
